query:
-- Test 2: Duplicate phones in clients table (per business)
SELECT phone, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT businessOwnerId) as owners
FROM clients
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != ''
GROUP BY phone
HAVING cnt > 1
LIMIT 20;

-- Test 3: Un-normalized phones in clients table
SELECT id, phone, name
FROM clients
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
LIMIT 20;

-- Test 4: Duplicate phones in client_accounts table
SELECT phone, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM client_accounts
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != ''
GROUP BY phone
HAVING cnt > 1
LIMIT 20;

-- Test 5: Un-normalized phones in client_accounts
SELECT id, phone, name
FROM client_accounts
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
LIMIT 20;

-- Test 6: Locations with countryCode
SELECT id, name, countryCode FROM locations LIMIT 20;
